name: Strawberry-Pecan Bread/ak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Shred the peel from 1 orange and measure out 3 teaspoons of juice.
3. Add 3/4 cup liquid (buttermilk or water) to the bowl with the dry ingredients.
4. Add the softened butter and orange juice to the mixture.
5. Beat the egg separately, then add it and the orange peel to the flour mixture.
6. Stir until just combined.
7. In a small bowl, toss the strawberries, nuts, and 1/4 cup of flour.
8. Carefully stir the fruit mixture into the batter.
9. Grease an 8x4x2 inch loaf pan.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 to 60 minutes.
12. Serve warm with cream cheese or wrap and store.
